facts.claim: Nordfjordeid is the administrative centre of Stad Municipality in Vestland county, Norway.

Nordfjordeid[3] is the administrative centre of Stad Municipality in Vestland county, Norway. Situated at the end of Eidsfjorden (an arm of Nordfjorden), west of the lake Hornindalsvatnet. The village serves as a commercial and cultural hub for the greater Nordfjord region.
